data.body: Update hook tests group B: update v2 path references to v3. Affected files: (1) test-pre-commit-review-gate.sh: lines 139,160 - update allowlist path comment/assert. (2) test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh: lines 36,1400,1433 - update allowlist filtering examples. (3) test-two-layer-review-gate.sh: line 408 - update merge resolution path comment. (4) test-cascade-breaker.sh: lines 6-7,42,83,89,119,126,139,161 - update path pattern in tests. (5) test-compute-diff-hash-tickets.sh: lines 132,135,142,149,156-159 - update exclusion pathspec refs. (6) test-merge-conflict-regression.sh: lines 10,197,243,250,284,342 - update conflict path examples. (7) test-merge-to-main-portability.sh: lines 216,219-222,247 - update cleanliness checks. (8) test-pre-edit-write-dispatcher.sh: update any v2 path refs. Depends on T11 (aee4-32d6).
